title: Tattoo Gift Certificate Template, Editable Gothic Voucher for Tattoo Studio, Printable Dark Luxury Gift Card, Canva Template
description:
Looking for a professional way to offer gift certificates at your tattoo studio? This dark luxury gothic-style gift certificate template instantly elevates your brand and makes gifting ink experiences effortless for your clients.

✨ WHAT'S INCLUDED:
• 1 high-resolution gift certificate template (300 DPI)
• Easy-to-edit Canva template
• Print-ready PDF format
• Commercial use license included
• Instant download after purchase

🖤 HOW TO EDIT:
1. Click the Canva link provided after purchase
2. Customize text fields with your studio details
3. Add recipient and gift amount
4. Download as PDF and print or share digitally
5. No design experience needed!

⚡ FEATURES:
• Dark luxury gothic aesthetic
• Professional typography and layout
• Fully customizable text and colors
• High-quality print resolution
• Works on any device with internet

🎯 PERFECT FOR:
• Tattoo studios and independent artists
• Holiday and birthday gift offerings
• Last-minute client gifts
• Building recurring revenue streams
• Professional studio branding

❓ FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:
Q: Can I use this for my tattoo business?
A: Yes! Commercial use license is included for your studio.

Q: What if I'm new to Canva?
A: The template is beginner-friendly with simple text editing - no design skills required!

📝 PLEASE NOTE:
This is a digital download template. No physical item will be shipped. You'll receive instant access to edit in Canva after purchase.
source_why: Gift certificates are the #1 selling digital template for tattoo studios. High demand, low competition for premium dark/gothic aesthetic. Average seller price £4.99-£7.99. Buyers searching for editable, professional gift cards they can customise in Canva.
